# ShakiLabs UI artifact

`shakilabs-ui-0.2.4.tgz` is the active exact artifact for `@shakilabs/ui` 0.2.4.

- Source repository: `00.root-shakilabs`
- Source commit: `7c75aa0`
- SHA-256: `b6211fa89cdd1f6eb413bb48831e7fb25bb2e4ac701215650815fd9cfe57e63e`

All artifacts are committed so an isolated Vercel checkout can run `npm ci` without a private registry token.
